title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Jamia Millia Islamia Act, 1988. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 26th December, 1988, vide notifications No. S.O. 1195(E), dated 21st December, 1988, See Gazette of India, Extraordinary, part II, sec. 3(ii).
